patch

This is a corrective update.
Details can be seen on the URL: https://www.sqlite.org/releaselog/3_32_3.html
"Various minor bug fixes including fixes for tickets 8f157e8010b22af0, 9fb26d37cefaba40, e367f31901ea8700, b706351ce2ecf59a, 7c6d876f84e6e7e2, and c8d3b9f0a750a529."
